title: Lo scapolo
writer: Antonio Pietrangeli, Sandro Continenza, Ruggero Maccari
actors: Alberto Sordi, Sandra Milo, Nino Manfredi
plot: Paolo Anselmi is a happily single man. He lives in a flat with a friend but is forced to leave when the friend gets married. He then goes to a boarding house where he flirts with a girl but ditches her when she proposes marriage. ...
